name: highvolt-ai
description: HighVolt AI - personal work assistant for high voltage management

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.package:win: npm run build --prefix client && electron-builder --win portable
